ingestBaseUrl.description: Base URL for extension event ingest API.

evaluationMode.description: Use browser-local policy evaluation or server-side guardrail evaluation.

controlCenterUrl.description: Control Center base URL used by popup connect flow.

userEmail.description: Authenticated user email attached to extension events.

userIdpSubject.description: Identity provider subject attached to extension events.

userDisplayName.description: Display name attached to extension events payload.

bootstrapUrl.description: Managed enrollment endpoint that exchanges a bootstrap token for a device credential.

bootstrapToken.description: Managed enrollment credential used to obtain a device token automatically.

browserSecurity.description: Browser guardrails that detect and block Shadow AI domains outside the approved allowlist.

mode.description: Audit-only or enforced blocking mode for browser guardrails.

shadowAiDomains.description: Additional AI domains treated as Shadow AI unless explicitly approved.

fileInspection.description: Attachment inspection controls for AI prompt uploads.

maxFileBytes.description: Maximum file size allowed for normal submission.

maxExtractedChars.description: Maximum extracted text characters per file.

incompleteAction.description: Action when attachment inspection is incomplete.
